mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (email, password, name, role, height, weight, disease, goal) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, COALESCE(#{role},'USER'), #{height}, #{weight}, #{disease}, #{goal})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM members WHERE email = #{email} AND active = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT * FROM members
active = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY mno
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET name = #{name}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, disease = #{disease}, goal = #{goal}, gender = #{gender}, birth_year = #{birthYear}, activity_level = #{activityLevel}, goal_type = #{goalType}, job_activity = #{jobActivity}, exercise_frequency = #{exerciseFrequency}, exercise_intensity = #{exerciseIntensity}, daily_steps = #{dailySteps}, weekly_exercise_hours = #{weeklyExerciseHours}, target_calories = #{targetCalories} WHERE email = #{email}
UPDATE members SET password = #{password} WHERE mno = #{mno}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM members
(name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY mno
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET active = #{active} WHERE mno = #{mno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO password_reset_tokens (mno, token, expires_at) VALUES (#{mno}, #{token}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE password_reset_tokens SET used = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE password_reset_tokens SET used = 1 WHERE mno = #{mno} AND used = 0
